channel.title: CCBar Updates
channel.description: Auto-update feed for CCBar — Claude Code menu bar app.

item.title: CCBar 0.1.2
item.description:
CCBar 0.1.2
Sparkle 버전 비교 수정 (CFBundleVersion 정합)
### Install 1. Download `CCBar-0.1.2.zip` below 2. Unzip → drag `CCBar.app` to `/Applications` 3. First launch will ask for Accessibility + Apple Events permissions
_Auto-update is live — future versions install themselves via Sparkle._

item.title: CCBar 0.1.3
item.description:
CCBar 0.1.3
서명팝업 반복 노출 수정
### Install 1. Download `CCBar-0.1.3.zip` below 2. Unzip → drag `CCBar.app` to `/Applications` 3. First launch will ask for Accessibility + Apple Events permissions
_Auto-update is live — future versions install themselves via Sparkle._

item.title: CCBar 0.1.4
item.description:
CCBar 0.1.4
키체인 읽기전용 + 토스트 활성화면
### Install 1. Download `CCBar-0.1.4.zip` below 2. Unzip → drag `CCBar.app` to `/Applications` 3. First launch will ask for Accessibility + Apple Events permissions
_Auto-update is live — future versions install themselves via Sparkle._
